loadFailedDefault: Failed to load the segment list, please try again later
loadErrorHint: You can switch to "upload an audio file" mode instead, or try again later.
noSegmentsHint: This speaker has no segments to combine. Switch to "upload an audio file" mode to clone.
emptyHint: Check segments of {min}-{max} seconds as the clone sample (recommended {recMin}-{recMax} seconds for best results)
shortSingleHint: This single segment is short; consider combining multiple segments to reach 3+ seconds
